creator: mark@hobokenproperties.com
text:
Trying to build xorg from ports.  In /usr/ports/x11/xorg, and issuing
command <make package-recursive clean> the build always halts when
trying to create the docbook-4.2.tbz package.  Several lines of tar:
share/sgml/docbook/4.2/{filename}: Cannot stat: No such file or directory.
Then pkg_create: make_dist: tar command failed with code 256.  Tried 3
times with exactly same result.
